# Outline

## Mode

standard

## Structure Verdict

The structure is usable, but the rework claim must be repaired before export.

## Reader Journey

The reader starts with a decision request, sees evidence for cycle-time friction, reviews a bounded pilot, and understands why one claim needs research before revision finishes.

## Section Architecture

| Section | Objective | Reader State In | Reader State Out | Main Claim | Evidence Hooks | Evidence Strength | Reader Questions | Objection Handled | Approx Length | Transition To Next | Keep/Cut |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------------|------------|----------------|-------------------|------------------|-------------------|---------------|--------------------|----------|
| Decision request | Ask for pilot approval | Needs the ask | Knows the requested decision | Approve a two-quarter pilot | Brief, strategy | strong | What is requested? | Scope creep | 250 words | Current friction | Keep |
| Current friction | Explain why the current process is weak | Skeptical | Understands cycle-time issue | Mixed intake slows review | S1, S2 | strong | Why now? | Sample limits | 400 words | Pilot design | Keep |
| Pilot design | Show bounded change | Concerned about disruption | Sees limited change | Separate advisory and decision intake | Strategy | moderate | What changes? | Overhead | 500 words | Evidence limits | Keep |
| Evidence limits | Name source gap | Needs confidence | Sees the research repair needed | Rework claim needs support | S1, S2 | weak | What is not proven? | Overclaiming | 300 words | Next step | Keep |

## Objection Map

| Objection | Where Addressed | Handling |
|-----------|-----------------|----------|
| The pilot may create extra process. | Pilot design | Keep pilot narrow and time-bound. |
| Rework reduction is not proven. | Evidence limits | Route back to research before claiming it. |

## Drafting Risks

- The draft may overclaim avoided rework.
- The conclusion may hide the research gap instead of naming it.
- The paper may become a process manual instead of a decision memo.
